candidate_definition_hints.text: NGMLR is a long-read mapper designed to align PacBio or Oxford Nanopore (standard and ultra-long) to a reference genome with a focus on reads that span structural variations

Download [binary](https://github.com/philres/ngmlr/releases/tag/v0.2.6) from github and unzip or [![install with bioconda](https://img.shields.io/badge/install%20with-bioconda-brightgreen.svg?style=flat-square)](http://bioconda.github.io/recipes/ngmlr/README.html) or pull docker…
